content:
# Low Resistivity Pay

**Summary**: Reservoir zones with low resistivity that still contain significant hydrocarbons.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-alqunais|Alqunais, 2019]] investigated low--resistivity-pay to address the problem of underestimating hydrocarbon reserves.

## Scientific Context

- [[2019-alqunais|Alqunais, 2019]] A common challenge in both carbonate and clastic reservoirs due to thin beds or conductive minerals.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2019-alqunais|Alqunais, 2019]] Identified by comparing standard logs with high-resolution tools.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Approximately 30% of hydrocarbon reserves are estimated in low-resistivity shaly sand formations globally. ([[2019-alqunais|Alqunais, 2019, p. 69]])
